location: Guaranteed drop from the Crucible Knight patrolling the bridges of the Siofra Aqueduct, reached from Nokron, Eternal City via the Aqueduct-Facing Cliffs grace north of Hallowhorn Grounds.
tactics: Climb the cliff path north of Hallowhorn Grounds in Nokron, Eternal City to reach the Aqueduct-Facing Cliffs grace, then head into the aqueduct itself.
This lone Crucible Knight fights like the Crucible Knight duo bosses elsewhere in Nokron — sword-and-shield stance with jumping horn-thrust and tail-whip attacks — but is fought solo here.
Don't confuse this with the two Crucible Knight bosses guarding Nokron's main plaza; those drop different Crucible armor/weapons, not this shield.
lore: Set with a great horn said to carry ancient holiness — when its wielder slams the shield into a foe, that horn skewers them.

builds.name: Strength tank with strong scaling growth
builds.why: Strength scaling improves quickly from D at base to C at +3 and B at +10, giving solid attack power for a defensive greatshield as you upgrade it.
